posts.author: HannahCrafts84
posts.text: Finally finished my new quilt! The fabric patterns were a bit tricky but it turned out lovely. Can't wait to hang it in the living room.
posts.explanation: Post is harmless personal content sharing a creative hobby without any policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: OakhavenLocal92
posts.text: Honestly, the government's new plan for public transport seems ridiculous. They're charging way too much for a simple bus ride and claiming it will reduce congestion when I see more people stuck in traffic than ever before. If they can't fix their own mess, why should we pay? #frustrated
posts.explanation: The post expresses lawful criticism of government policy without containing threats, abuse, or harmful misinformation.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeLibraryUpdates
posts.text: Reminder: The Northbridge community centre is hosting a free drop-in session for local history research this Saturday at 10am in the main hall.
posts.explanation: The post is a benign notice about a community service event and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: GreyfordFixer
posts.text: Hey everyone, need urgent help! The app is asking for my payment details and password to verify a transaction. Please send me your security code or card info via [link removed] immediately so I can complete the transfer.
posts.explanation: This post is a direct credential-harvesting attempt asking for sensitive financial information and passwords through a suspicious link.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MorganBellmere
posts.text: Has anyone seen this viral video claiming a chemical spill near the Bellmere docks? The footage looks incredibly grainy and the audio sounds like it's being played back through a speaker, not recorded live. I'm worried people are panicking over fake news. #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: The post promotes a false claim using media that appears manipulated; specialist investigation is required to verify authenticity and public harm.

posts.author: MoorvaleGardener
posts.text: Big news for local flower lovers! The annual Moorvale Garden Show is taking place this Sunday at the community grounds. Expect a stunning display of rare blooms, live music from the band 'The Green Note', and plenty of family-friendly activities. Entry is free for residents. Can't wait to see everyone there! 🌸🎶 #MoorvaleGardenShow #CommunityEvent
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement for a fictional community event. The post promotes a positive local gathering without any policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
